fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the exchange rate adjustment register.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account type that was adjusted for exchange rate fluctuations when you ran the Adjust Exchange Rates batch job.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting group of the exchange rate adjustment register on this line.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the currency whose exchange rate was adjusted.

fields.name: Adjusted Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that was adjusted by the batch job for customer, vendor and/or bank ledger entries.

fields.name: Adjusted Base (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in LCY that was adjusted by the batch job for G/L, customer, vendor and/or bank ledger entries.

fields.name: Adjusted Amt. (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount by which the batch job has adjusted G/L, customer, vendor and/or bank ledger entries for exchange rate fluctuations.

fields.name: Adjusted Base (Add.-Curr.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the additional-reporting-currency amount the batch job has adjusted G/L, customer, and other entries for exchange rate fluctuations.

fields.name: Adjusted Amt. (Add.-Curr.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the additional-reporting-currency amount the batch job has adjusted G/L, customer, and other entries for exchange rate fluctuations.

fields.name: Adjusted Customers
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of customer ledger entries with remaining amount that was adjusted.

fields.name: Adjusted Vendors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of vendor ledger entries with remaining amount that was adjusted.

fields.name: Adjustment Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total adjustment amount of exchange rate adjustment ledger entries.

fields.name: Adjusted Employees
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of emplooyee ledger entries with remaining amount that was adjusted.
